titleStmt.title: SII 10.452: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 452. (A.R. No. 97 of 1917.) AT THE BOTTOM OF FACE B OF THE HUGE NANDI-PILLAR LYING NEAR A RUINED TEMPLE, MALKĀPURAM, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1204. (Chitrabhānu)

summary.p: States that Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, son of [Modali]piḷa-Paṇḍita, gave 50 sheep and Īśana-Bōya 50 sheep for a perpetual lamp each in the temple of Viśvēśvara. The latter made the gift for the merit of Kāśīśvara Śivāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē yugapakṣēṁdau citrabhānau ca vatsarē śrāvaṇē budhavārē ca grastē sūryyē ca rāhuṇā
mahādēva śrīmān vyaracaya dakhaṁḍaṁpaśupatēḥ pradīpaṁ gēyaḥ pitrōrbhbhavati kila dharmā
mahat pratiṣṭhāṁ cakrēyaṁgēsvayamapi ca viśvēśvaraśivasya nāmnā kriṣṇāyā staṭabhuvi vibhu mmaṁdarapu
rē . bhāradvājagōtru laina modalipiḷapaṁḍitula koḍkulu mahādēvabhaṭṭōpādhyālu veṭṭina Akhaṁḍadīpa
mu goṟṟelu 50 Idīpamu naḍipiḍikāṁpu sanigarapu mallebōIni koḍku rāmaṁnabōyuṁḍu Iyanaku
Oka nivēśanamu vritti na 5 nitya māneṁḍu nētilekka Ācaṁdratārakamugā naḍapuvāṁḍu . viśvēśanātha
rupuṁgavēna kritasthitēḥ kriṣṇānadītaṭāṁttēḥ Iśēna kāśīśvara dēsikasya bhrityēna dēvasya kritaḥ pradīpaḥ .
ḍku Isanabōyuṁḍu tamu rakṣiṁcina dāta kāśīśvaraśivācāryyulaku puṇya
goṟelu 50 Idīpamu naḍipiḍikāṁpu bōdako yēṟṟabōyu
tilekkanu Ācaṁdratāraṁkamugā naḍapuvāṁḍu .
Note.—The chronogram yugapakṣēṁdau is unintelligible. The correct Śaka year meant is evidently 1204 which corresponds to Chitrabhānu.
Digital edition of SII 10.452 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
